memberdef.name: HIP_CHECK
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(status != hipSuccess) \ { \ std::cerr << "HIP Error: " << hipGetErrorString(status) << " in file " << __FILE__ \ << " at line " << __LINE__ << std::endl; \ exit(EXIT_FAILURE); \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_CHECK
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(status != HIPDNN_STATUS_SUCCESS) \ { \ std::cerr << "hipDNN Error: " << hipdnnGetErrorString(status) << " in file " \ << __FILE__ << " at line " << __LINE__ << std::endl; \ exit(EXIT_FAILURE); \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_FE_CHECK
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ auto const& status = statusObj; \ if(!status.is_good()) \ { \ std::cerr << "hipDNN Frontend Error: " << status.get_message() << " in file " \ << __FILE__ << " at line " << __LINE__ << std::endl; \ exit(EXIT_FAILURE); \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< int64_t > &dims, hipdnn_frontend::DataType_t dataType, const TensorLayout &layout=TensorLayout::NCHW)
memberdef.name: createTensor
